name: Secret
overview: Curious about what stars are really like? Their makeup routines? Styling tips? Favorite hangout spots? Body care secrets? This show reveals the private side of celebrities—from their beauty and fashion to the hottest places they love to go.

trailers.title: 시즌1. APRIL[에이프릴의 쉿크릿] 1화 예고_나은이는 코미디언 얼굴?!
